name: Dim Sum (Steamed Chinese Appetizers).
recipeIngredient: 3/4 lb Ground meat (beef, pork, or a mix of two)
1 1/2 tsp Red chili sauce with garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the ground meat well with the remaining BASIC ingredients until smooth.
2. Separate the mixture into four equal parts.
3. For each part, add one of the EXTRA condiments and mix well.
4. To stuff the dumplings, place about one teaspoon or a pecan-sized ball of the mixture into a wonton skin. Fold into shape. Possible shapes include a purse, fish, chocolate kiss, nurse's cap, or any other creative shape.
5. Make sure the parts of the wonton skin sticking out are minimal to avoid toughness.
6. Use different shapes for each condiment so you can identify what is what.
7. Place the dumplings on top of lettuce leaves on a steam rack (the leaf helps prevent sticking). Be very careful not to let them touch each other, as they may stick.
8. Steam for 20 minutes and enjoy hot. These can be frozen and reheated in the microwave.
